'''zagoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placket|placket]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placket|placket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zagoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægeketh|zægeketh]] || [[word:zægekej|zægekej]] || [[word:zægekesh|zægekesh]] || [[word:zægeke|zægeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagogokoth|zagogokoth]] || [[word:zagogokoj|zagogokoj]] || [[word:zagogokosh|zagogokosh]] || [[word:zagogoko|zagogoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagokoth|zagokoth]] || [[word:zagokoj|zagokoj]] || [[word:zagokosh|zagokosh]] || [[word:zagoko|zagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagofkoth|zagofkoth]] || [[word:zagofkoj|zagofkoj]] || [[word:zagofkosh|zagofkosh]] || [[word:zagofkof|zagofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zagokotho|zagokotho]] || [[word:zagokojo|zagokojo]] || [[word:zagokosho|zagokosho]] || [[word:zagokoko|zagokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zagokoth|zagokoth]] || [[word:zagokoj|zagokoj]] || [[word:zagokosh|zagokosh]] || [[word:zagoko|zagoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zagokothol|zagokothol]] || [[word:zagokojol|zagokojol]] || [[word:zagokoshol|zagokoshol]] || [[word:zagokokol|zagokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zagokothotho|zagokothotho]] || [[word:zagokojojo|zagokojojo]] || [[word:zagokoshosho|zagokoshosho]] || [[word:zagokoko|zagokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zagokothon|zagokothon]] || [[word:zagokojon|zagokojon]] || [[word:zagokoshon|zagokoshon]] || [[word:zagokokon|zagokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zagokothoro|zagokothoro]] || [[word:zagokojoro|zagokojoro]] || [[word:zagokoshoro|zagokoshoro]] || [[word:zagokokoro|zagokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
